overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi action game showing a hooded protagonist exploring a desert planet settlement. The character moves through industrial vehicle bays, open market plazas, and grand halls with high ceilings, featuring warm orange lighting and a mix of stone and metal architecture.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow industrial corridor past parked heavy vehicles

entered.detail: heavy industrial tank with treads and orange markings parked along the right wall
large industrial pipes running vertically along the left wall
warm orange lights mounted on the stone walls
large stone tiles covering the ground surface

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow industrial vehicle bay with warm orange lighting. A large tank vehicle dominates the right side while metal pipes line the left wall. The environment is enclosed with stone and metal construction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market plaza with large entrance door

events.description: exits narrow vehicle bay into open plaza area with high ceilings

agents.ego_description: walking toward a large wooden door at the far end of the plaza while passing market stalls

notable_agents.action: guard standing near the large wooden door

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading upward on the left side of the plaza
massive circular door with metal reinforcements at the end of the plaza
chain-link metal fencing along the right side
wooden market stall with goods on display

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide open plaza with a large wooden door at the far end. Stone stairs rise on the left while market stalls line the right. Sparse NPCs walk through the space, including a guard near the entrance door.

events.description: character looks upward at the ceiling architecture while walking

agents.ego_description: turning to explore the workshop area and looking up at the high ceiling structure

notable_agents.action: worker standing near a workbench on the right side

entered.detail: wooden workbench with tools and equipment
hanging orange fabric panels covering the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character explores the workshop area of the plaza, passing workbenches and metal grating walls. The ceiling features hanging orange fabric panels. A worker NPC is visible near equipment on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase leading to upper corridor

events.description: begins ascending the large stone staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing a wide stone staircase toward an upper level corridor

notable_agents.action: figure walking up the stairs ahead of the character

entered.detail: wide stone steps with metal railings on the sides
metal handrail along the left side of the staircase
bright light source at the end of the upper passage

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide stone staircase with metal railings, moving toward a bright exit at the top. The ceiling features draped orange fabric, and another figure climbs ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with high ceiling and skylights

events.description: enters vast grand hall with high ceiling and natural light from skylights

agents.ego_description: walking through the massive hall toward a group of figures in the distance

notable_agents.action: group of figures walking ahead in the distance

entered.detail: tall ceiling with glass skylights allowing natural light to stream down
large orange fabric banners hanging from the ceiling
enormous stone archway at the far end of the hall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vast grand hall with a high ceiling featuring skylights that cast beams of natural light. Large orange fabric banners hang overhead, and a massive stone arch is visible in the distance. Other figures walk ahead in the same direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped industrial bay into a vast, light-filled grand hall. It begins within a narrow corridor of stone and metal, passing a large tank vehicle and industrial piping under warm orange lighting. As the character emerges from the enclosure, the space opens into a wide plaza filled with market stalls and stone stairs, eventually shifting into a workshop area characterized by metal grating and hanging orange fabric panels. The camera then ascends a wide stone staircase toward a bright exit, following another figure upward beneath draped fabrics. Finally, the scene expands into a massive grand hall where high ceilings and skylights cast beams of natural light over hanging banners and a distant stone arch.
